data.content: Implementation review rejected. 1. Acceptance criteria require persisted token counts to remain scoped to the agent and beat that actually consumed them, but src/lib/terminal-manager-initial-child.ts:110-111 still expands a wave session to prepared.waveBeatIds and src/lib/agent-token-usage.ts:54-72 writes the same turn.completed usage to every beatId in that array. 2. The focused regression test still codifies the wrong behavior in src/lib/__tests__/agent-token-usage.test.ts:33-65 by asserting that one turn should create token_usage entries for both beat-a and beat-b, which masks the bug instead of protecting against it. Sanity gates on the reviewed checkout: bun run lint (same pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all passed.
